reviews.comment:
Me baje la app por el descuento,y cuando le aviso al empleado me dice que no está funcionando la app y que no me pueden brindar el descuento,es la segunda vez que me pasa,supongo que la tercera es la vencida,..

(Translated by Google)
I downloaded the app for the discount, and when I told the employee, he said the app wasn't working and they couldn't give me the discount. It's the second time this has happened to me, I guess the third time's the charm...
